query:
INSERT INTO PointDistributionData (
                    filter_id, is_pro_leaderboard, a, b, loc, scale, top_scale
                 )
                 VALUES (?, TRUE, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                    a = VALUES(a),
                    b = VALUES(b),
                    loc = VALUES(loc),
                    scale = VALUES(scale),
                    top_scale = VALUES(top_scale)
